title: Language Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing a language as 'Indo-European', 'Sino-Tibetan', or 'Afro-Asiatic' based on its branch.
A language is considered 'Indo-European' if it belongs to the Indo-European language family, 'Sino-Tibetan' if it belongs to the Sino-Tibetan language family, and 'Afro-Asiatic' if it belongs to the Afro-Asiatic language family.
For example: 'English is an Indo-European language.'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given language branch
